FIG. 01 — DAILY FUNCTIONAL WATER EXPERIENCE
Why water matters

Your body is 70% water.

Almost every organ, every tissue, every cell is mostly water. The quality of what you drink is not a small choice — it is the medium in which the entire body operates.

We replace 2–3 litres of water every day. Over a lifetime, that becomes tens of thousands of glasses — each one becoming part of the body’s daily water environment.

Daily foundation

Better water begins with one simple idea: every glass becomes part of the body’s daily environment.

The modern problem

Oxidative stress starts quietly.

Every day, the body is exposed to stress, processed foods, pollution, poor sleep, UV exposure and environmental load. These stressors can create free radicals — unstable molecules that look for electrons from nearby molecules.

When free radicals build up faster than the body can keep them in balance, the result is called oxidative stress. It is not usually something people feel immediately; it accumulates quietly through daily habits, lifestyle and environment.

In simple terms: free radicals are unstable molecules; when their activity builds faster than the body can keep in balance, oxidative stress can accumulate quietly over time.
Free radicals & oxidative stressFig. 03
What this visual means

Free radicals are unstable molecules. They try to regain balance by taking electrons from nearby molecules. When this happens too often, it can contribute to oxidative stress.

Step 1Free radicalsDaily stressors can create unstable molecules with unpaired electrons.
Step 2Oxidative stressWhen too many unstable molecules accumulate, the body experiences oxidative stress — a gradual imbalance.
01 / Daily exposure

Daily oxidative load

Your body handles many small stressors every day — from sleep and diet to pollution, emotional stress and ageing.

02 / Gradual imbalance

Builds quietly

Oxidative stress is the build-up of this imbalance over time. It is a useful way to understand why daily wellness habits matter.

What free radicals doSimple science

Stable molecule

A balanced molecule has paired electrons moving in a stable pattern.

Free radical

When an electron is unpaired, the molecule becomes more reactive.

free radicals seek electrons — this creates imbalance

Electron seeking

A free radical may react with nearby molecules while trying to regain stability.

Oxidative stress

When this imbalance happens repeatedly, it is described as oxidative stress.

Cell environmentProblem education

Balanced cell

A calm visual for healthy daily balance.

Stressed cell

A visual metaphor for accumulated oxidative load.

8 Excellent Healthy Functionals

Why choose Watersource? Eight water properties, explained simply.

A concise guide to the eight functional water properties — hydrogen-rich water, alkaline pH, negative ORP, micro-cluster water, oxygenation, ionic minerals, filtration and acidic water.

01 / 08HYDROGEN
H₂

Hydrogen-Rich Water

Hydrogen-rich water works as a powerful antioxidant property that neutralises toxic free radicals, supports anti-inflammatory wellness and helps improve daily energy.

02 / 08ALKALINE
pH

Moderate Alkaline pH

Alkaline water has the capacity to neutralise acid and supports acid–alkaline balance through daily drinking water.

03 / 08ORP
−ORP

Oxidation Reduction Potential

ORP is an antioxidant reading. Negative ORP, shown up to -800 mV, helps reduce free-radical damage from UV exposure, pollution, pesticides and chemicals.

04 / 0857HZ
57Hz

Small Micro-Cluster Water

57Hz small micro-cluster water has smaller water molecule clusters that pass through cell membranes more effectively for stronger hydration and faster nutrient absorption.

05 / 08OXYGEN
O₂

Oxygenated Alkaline Ionised Water

Alkaline ionised water is oxygenated water that provides vital oxygen for cells and supports energy, better sleep, immune enhancement and cell recovery.

06 / 08MINERALS
CaMgKMinerals

Ionic Minerals

Loaded with ionic minerals including calcium, magnesium, potassium and sodium, the mineral profile improves metabolism, supports immunity and restores self-healing power.

07 / 08FILTER
πFilter

Filtration / Hexagonal Water

Two powerful filters with TM π water technology, hexagonal structure and microorganism ceramic create resonance energy beyond ordinary alkaline water.

08 / 08ACIDIC
Acidic

Acidic Water

Acidic water is used externally for killing bacteria, disinfecting, healing support and stopping itch.

These eight functionals define the water profile: hydrogen-rich water, alkaline pH, ORP, micro-cluster hydration, oxygenation, ionic minerals, hexagonal filtration and acidic water settings.

Functional water support areas

What Watersource Functional Water is designed to support.

From antioxidant wellness and hydration to energy, recovery, skin comfort and daily vitality, Watersource positions its functional water around everyday whole-body support.

01

Neutralise toxic free radicals

Molecular hydrogen is a selective antioxidant that neutralises toxic free radicals such as hydroxyl radicals while leaving useful physiological radicals alone.

02

Reduce oxidative stress

By reducing excess free-radical activity, hydrogen-rich alkaline ionised water is used to support lower oxidative stress in everyday wellness routines.

03

Support antioxidant activity

Negative ORP water carries antioxidant potential; Watersource demonstrates this through hydrogen-rich water and ORP readings up to about -800 mV.

04

Improve energy

Oxygenated alkaline ionised water supports cellular oxygen availability, hydration and nutrient absorption, which are linked to daily vitality and energy.

05

Support immunity

Mineral-rich functional water supplies ionic minerals such as calcium, magnesium, potassium and sodium that support normal body function and immune resilience.

06

Support detoxification

Clean filtered alkaline water, stronger hydration and micro-cluster water support daily cleansing, waste removal and normal detoxification pathways.

07

Help hydration

57Hz small micro-cluster water has smaller molecule clusters that pass through cell membranes more effectively for stronger hydration and faster nutrient absorption.

08

Support anti-aging

Antioxidant support, better hydration and reduced oxidative stress are linked to skin health, cellular ageing support and long-term daily wellness maintenance.

09

Help skin and beauty

Hydrogen-rich water supports antioxidant wellness from within, while acidic water is used externally for cleansing, bacteria control, itch relief and skin comfort.

10

Support digestion

Moderate alkaline pH helps neutralise excess acidity, while daily hydration supports smoother digestion and overall digestive comfort.

11

Support weight management

Better hydration, mineral intake and daily alkaline water habits support metabolism, appetite rhythm and weight-management routines.

12

Support sleep

Oxygenated alkaline ionised water and balanced daily hydration are associated with recovery, relaxation and better daily sleep rhythm.

13

Support exercise recovery

Hydration, oxygenated water, ionic minerals and antioxidant support help replenish the body after activity and support post-exercise recovery.

14

Support family wellness

Watersource is designed as a daily household water system, supporting children, adults and seniors through consistent access to functional drinking water.

15

Support daily health maintenance

Hydrogen, alkaline pH, negative ORP, minerals, oxygenation and filtration combine into a daily water routine for long-term health maintenance.

16

Cleaner functional water at home

Advanced filtration, TM π water technology, mineral support, hydrogen-rich water and external-use acidic water are combined into one home water system.

Our founder · Mrs Wee

Purpose, resilience and water wellness.

Mrs Wee, founder of Evergreen Group, brings a biology background, decades of entrepreneurship and a personal wellness journey into Watersource’s education-first approach.

After decades in business and her own health wake-up call around age 65, she began exploring nutrition, water quality and preventive wellness. Today, Watersource is presented as a practical way for Singapore families to understand functional water through tasting, education and consultation.

“With water, we have to educate people. The body deserves a better daily foundation.”
Speak with a WaterSource specialist →
The instruments

The benefit is the water. The instrument is up to you.

WaterSource offers different product formats for different routines: countertop purification and heating, under-sink ionizing, and portable hydrogen generation.

H001 Alkaline Hydrogen-Rich Water Purifier

A countertop multifunctional hydrogen-rich beverage purifier for family or shared-space daily water routines.

  • Purification, mineralisation, sterilisation, hydrogen enrichment and instant heating in one unit.
  • Uses super-concentration hydrogen dissolution with stated supply up to 3000–5000 ppb.
  • Six instant water-temperature settings, child lock, filter replacement reminder and 150ml / 300ml / 500ml quantitative supply.
Best for: family homes, shared spaces and customers who want purified hydrogen-rich water with hot-water convenience.

GEM 9000 Turbo Under Sink 9 Plates

WaterSource’s under-sink alkaline hydrogen functional water ionizer for a built-in kitchen setup.

  • Equipped with medical-grade 9 hybrid platinum plates and touchscreen control.
  • Direct-piping under-sink installation with preset water outflow.
  • Offers a wide natural pH range from pH 2.5 to pH 12 for different water settings.
Best for: kitchens, built-in installation, households wanting ionized alkaline hydrogen water from the tap area.

H2 Cap Plus Portable Hydrogen Water Generator

A compact personal hydrogen-water generator for customers who want a portable, on-the-go option.

  • Designed for daily routines, travel and personal hydration habits.
  • WaterSource describes the unit as using non-toxic, non-leaching materials inside and outside the product.
  • Often presented as a bundle with accessory options such as aroma therapy shower head and nano spray, subject to availability.
Best for: personal use, portability and comparing daily hydrogen-water habits before choosing a larger home system.

Questions, answered

Before you decide.

The most useful answers happen face-to-face — but here are the ones new customers ask most often.

Speak with a WaterSource specialist →
Will I actually feel a difference?

Customer experience varies. Many describe subtle changes — easier hydration, gentler digestion, steadier energy — over the first few weeks of daily use. The best way to evaluate is to taste the water yourself.

Do you share pricing online?

Pricing depends on the instrument, installation requirements, household usage and filter setup. During your showroom tasting, the team can explain available options clearly before you decide.

What maintenance is needed?

Filter replacement and maintenance depend on the instrument and household usage. Discuss filter cycles, service reminders and long-term costs during the visit.

Is there any obligation to buy?

No. The showroom tasting is designed to help you compare, ask questions and decide calmly whether Watersource fits your home.

Hydrogen-rich functional water for daily wellness. A trademark brand of Evergreen Health, serving Singapore since 2009.
